meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome can't scale projects. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Client Workflow to Scale AI Projects
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with project scaling. Master this professional client workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver high-quality AI apps faster.
content.answer_block: To scale as a freelancer, you must move from bespoke coding to a modular, AI-assisted architecture. By integrating Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for automated logic implementation, you reduce development cycles by 70%, allowing you to handle more clients without sacrificing code quality or your sanity.
content.intro:
You are drowning in a sea of custom repo setups and repetitive boilerplate. Every new client feels like starting from zero, the scope creep is real, and your profit margins are eroding as you spend nights debugging legacy code instead of shipping. The bottleneck isn't your talent; it's your lack of a repeatable, automated infrastructure.

It is time to pivot from 'hand-crafting' to 'system-engineering.' By treating your development workflow as a product, you can transform from an overworked freelancer into a high-velocity AI architect. This checklist outlines the exact framework to automate your build pipeline and regain control of your time.

steps.title: Standardize Project Scaffolding
steps.description: Create a base repository template that includes your preferred tech stack, linting, and CI/CD. This ensures every project starts with a professional foundation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a production-ready Next.js 14 boilerplate with Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI, and an optimized Supabase integration. Include a modular directory structure for API routes and database schema management.

steps.title: Automate Schema Generation
steps.description: Use AI to translate client requirements into database schemas instantly, preventing manual migration errors.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the provided client requirement document and output a Prisma schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application, including RLS policies for user data isolation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "generate prisma schema from requirements.txt"

steps.title: Implement Feature-Driven Development
steps.description: Break down complex features into autonomous modules that Claude Code can build independently.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Break down the 'User Authentication' feature into atomic tasks. Create a plan for implementing JWT, OAuth providers, and session management using the current stack.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "implement auth feature using the generated task plan"

steps.title: Automated Testing Suites
steps.description: Don't write tests manually. Generate unit and integration tests based on your feature code to ensure regression-free deployments.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a comprehensive Vitest suite for the newly created Auth module, covering edge cases like session expiry, invalid tokens, and rate limiting.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "generate and run tests for src/features/auth"

steps.title: Continuous Deployment Pipeline
steps.description: Finalize the workflow by automating the deployment trigger directly from your terminal.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a GitHub Action workflow file that runs linting, tests, and deploys to Vercel upon pushing to the main branch.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "setup github actions pipeline for production deployment"

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'Library of Prompts' specifically tuned for your coding style; it prevents the AI from drifting into generic patterns.
Use Claude Code's 'review' mode on every pull request to catch logic errors before they hit your staging environment.
Force the AI to comment on all complex business logic; it makes handing off projects to clients or future team members seamless.
Set up a 'Shadow Repo' for experimental AI features to test new libraries without polluting your production client code.
Require the AI to output a 'technical debt audit' at the end of every major feature implementation to track what needs refactoring.
content.next_steps: Begin by auditing your last three projects to identify the most repetitive tasks. Then, build a custom template using Antigravity and integrate it into your CLI workflow today.
content.conversion_block: Stop building the hard way and start scaling your freelance business with automated intelligence. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
